title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Nimbus Post

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Nimbus Post
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Nimbus Post. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Fleet Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About Nimbus Post:
Nimbus Post is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nimbus Post!
